name: Roadwarden
subtitle: Shield of the Elder Road
description: A hardened frontier guardian who survives through armor, discipline, and heavy strikes.
startMessage: You tighten the straps of your road-worn armor. The Elder Road will hold.
levelUpMessage: Your oath hardens. You reached level {level}.

name: Ember Sage
subtitle: Keeper of the First Flame
description: A fragile scholar of old fire magic who spends mana to deal high damage and manipulate battlefield pressure.
startMessage: A coal-bright ember stirs in your palm. Old fire remembers you.
levelUpMessage: The flame within you grows brighter. You reached level {level}.

name: Gravebound Scout
subtitle: Listener at the Edge of Death
description: A nimble hunter touched by old grave magic, relying on precision, evasion, and life-draining strikes.
startMessage: The dead are quiet today. That usually means they are listening.
levelUpMessage: A whisper from below guides your hand. You reached level {level}.
